section.heading: Regulations

content.p: The Secretary, in consultation with the Federal Interagency Council on Social Impact Partnerships, may issue regulations as necessary to carry out this division.

section.sourceCredit: (Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 531, title XX, § 2062, as added Pub. L. 115–123, div. E, title VIII, § 50802(2), Feb. 9, 2018, 132 Stat. 282.)
